preamble: Affrication and shift in place of articulation from a bilabial nasal [m] to a voiced alveolar affricate [dz]. This is a very rare sound change and represents a significant articulatory shift.

examples.note: Diminutive/passive stages where m + j > ndz/dz.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
